---
id: pipeline-show
title: "Get a pipeline of a given app"
description: "Get the specified pipeline of a given Bitrise app. You need to provide both an app slug and a pipeline id. You can get the pipeline id either by calling the [/pipelines](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/pipelines/pipeline-list) endpoint or by clicking on the pipeline on bitrise.io and copying the id from the URL. The endpoint returns all the relevant data of the pipeline."
sidebar_label: "Get a pipeline of a given app"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a pipeline of a given app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/pipelines/{pipeline-id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the specified pipeline of a given Bitrise app. You need to provide both an app slug and a pipeline id. You can get the pipeline id either by calling the [/pipelines](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/pipelines/pipeline-list) endpoint or by clicking on the pipeline on bitrise.io and copying the id from the URL. The endpoint returns all the relevant data of the pipeline.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
